opinion.h: United States v. Baltimore Post, 268 U.S. 388 (1925)
ERROR TO THE DISTRICT COURT OF THE UNITED STATES
opinion.p: Decided upon the authority of United States v. Dickey, ante, p. 268 U. S. 378.
MR. JUSTICE SUTHERLAND delivered the opinion of the Court.
This case comes here from a judgment of the lower court dismissing the indictment, 2 F.2d 761, and is the same in all respects as No. 768, United States v. Dickey et al., ante, p. 268 U. S. 378.
Upon that authority, the judgment below is
MR. JUSTICE STONE took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
